details: The agent correctly identified the failing container as 'log-shipper' by running kubectl commands against the cluster. It confirmed the 'web' container was healthy (ready=true) while 'log-shipper' was in CrashLoopBackOff (ready=false). It retrieved the logs using the correct -c log-shipper flag and reported the exact error message: 'ERROR: cannot resolve log-collector.logging.svc', which matches the known facts exactly.
